'''Pakrik Minor''' was a peaceful [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] in [[Kanchen sector/Legends|Kanchen sector]] with fruit and [[tallgrain]] farms, resorts, and undeveloped countryside. The [[Cloning/Legends|cloned]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] sleeper cell [[Jenth-44]] was located on Pakrik Minor. It was the twin planet of [[Pakrik Major]].

{{Planet-stub}}
